; Alessio Faraci (https://github.com/alefaraci)
; SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-only
; Modified: 2026-06-16
;
; Requires: https://github.com/asivery/rm-xovi-extensions

AFFECT [[1224665461898798997]]
	TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]#[[6504254477]] > [[5728643844066569666]]#[[254547437090201330]]
		REPLACE [[18195120765075523889]] WITH {
			~&18195120765075523889&~: (~&8399749361744822237&~, ~&7712900563799906&~) => {}
		}
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
